Notes: Update asks to add an A RR at a name that already owns a CNAME. The prerequisite only checks that the owner name exists, so the server must choose how to process the semantic CNAME exclusivity conflict.

Steps.Description: Prereq: alias.campus.edu. exists. Then attempt to add an A RR at the existing CNAME owner.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the owner remains CNAME-only or also contains the added A RR.
